text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan still hasn't arrived for our training
session. Just when I start to think she might not
show up at all...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I apologize for the inconvenience to
which I've subjected you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I am truly sorry. There's simply no excuse for it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The truth is, I've discovered a cookbook titled
"Cooking for Health," and it's been incredibly
enlightening.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Its recipes have vastly improved my condition,
but I found myself so wrapped up in cooking that
I lost track of time... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan does seem to be reflecting on her
actions, so I let her off with a light warning.
